narrative:
Pape Gueye is a central midfielder for Senegal, boasting an overall rating of 7.28/10. This places him in the top 1% of central midfields at this tournament. His rating reflects contributions from both his club form and current World Cup performances.

Gueye has been remarkably productive at this World Cup, contributing 0.763 goals and 0.381 assists per 90 minutes across 236 minutes played. However, his expected goals per 90 minutes stands at 0.153, with expected assists at 0.057. Defensively, he averages 1.525 interceptions and 2.288 clearances per 90 minutes.

Gueye serves as a crucial, dynamic central midfielder for Senegal, impacting both ends of the pitch. Scouts and fans should observe if he can sustain his impressive goal and assist rate given his lower expected metrics. His continued defensive contributions, like tackles and interceptions, will also be key to Senegal's progress.
